productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Glass Stylinc Multi Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 27 cm Height: 12 cm Made of synthetic leather with a glossy effect and nylon lining Bead work on the front One main compartment with a magnetic clasp Sippered compartment and mobile pouch inside the main compartment Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
